texto: ...But something worse can happen to the person who is betrayed.""What? What could possibly happen to me that is worse?"The older man stared at the younger, and then said pityingly, "You may learn treachery from it.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Jane Jakeman que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “...But something worse can happen to the person who is betrayed.""What? What could possibly happe…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, life-lesson, worse, com foco em reflexao.
